title: Global Coordinate Refresh Cadence Policy
refresh_steps: Check latest approved authoritative global geographic dataset metadata.
Compare city/capital list and coordinates against current approved bank.
Do not overwrite approved coordinates automatically.

failure_policy.fetch_failure: Keep last approved global coordinate bank active and create refresh_failure_review_required record.
failure_policy.schema_change: Block import and require manual schema review.
failure_policy.large_coordinate_shift: Block promotion and require manual geospatial review.
